description_long: This is a short sword or large dagger with a straight, double-edged blade featuring dark metallic tones and intricate engravings along its length. The hilt is highly decorative, with a circular, gear-like guard adorned in gold or brass, and several protruding spokes radiating outward. The handle is dark, possibly made of wood or metal, and ends in a rounded pommel with a small ring, suggesting it could be attached to a belt or strap. The sword is accompanied by a matching sheath, which is also decorated with ornate gold or brass patterns. The overall design is both functional and ceremonial, blending utility with elaborate steampunk or fantasy-inspired aesthetics. This object would stand out in an urban context as a collectible, prop, or display piece.
description: A short, double-edged sword with ornate gold/brass gear-like guard and matching decorated sheath, featuring dark engravings and a ringed pommel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, ornate circular guard, and decorated sheath.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the layered construction of the guard and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the blade, guard, and sheath, with engravings and ornamentation visible.
description_view_3: Reverse edge-on view, focusing on the alignment of the blade, guard, and handle from the pommel end.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark, rounded pommel with ring, decorative metallic accents
attribute_ornamentation: gear-like guard, gold/brass filigree, blade engravings, decorated sheath
